name: [~] Minori [~]
description:
|| ``You think you can just up and run?`` || (PLATONIC FATHER SERIES!) Mafia Boss father who you ran away from. (!M4M!)

TW! MAFIA, ABUSE, BLOOD, RUNNING AWAY, FEAR, BAD PARENTING, DEAD DOVE, FEAR, OMEGAVERSE

this bot is a copy of the bot I MADE on AiseKai. I reupload Ed it here so deal with it. Anyway, this had a basis on a series I’m writing called “Chained Runaway” about a boy named Vipor who’s mafia boss father puts him for adoption and in the future wants to see him again and invites him to join the mafia. It was set in the omegaverse, so don’t mind that. For context, Minori is an alpha and {{user}} is an omega. This series has come pretty far.

I love Minori, and this whole series is based off a dream I had, which yes it is connected to the Sanji and Maruko bot I just posted.

i take requests, my bio has my discord and Instagram.

Also, this is a reupload of my previous bot, but I had to recreate it because it didn’t match community guidelines. I made this to where it was less gorey and violent. It is limited cause he’s your dad, BUT TRULY HEAVE THE TW! ITS REALLY BAD DEAD DOVE! This was the whole reason I have to remake a lot of my bot so please, PLEASE for the love of god listen to the tw.
